title: Flask runs with debug=True and host 0.0.0.0
suggestion: Disable the debugger (Werkzeug console = RCE) and bind to localhost for non-production; gate via env var.

title: init_db() executes as an import side effect
evidence: app.py:191 init_db() called at module top level, so importing app.py touches the filesystem/DB
suggestion: Guard DB init behind create_app()/__main__ so tests and importers control initialization.

title: ?author= filter uses substring LIKE rather than exact match
evidence: app.py:106 SELECT * FROM books WHERE author LIKE '%<value>%'
suggestion: Acceptable and matches tests; note that it is substring, not exact-author, matching for cross-run comparison.
